title: CEN-CENELEC AI Act harmonized-standardization work
summary: AI Act-supporting harmonized standards work covering risk management, transparency, human oversight, cybersecurity, quality assurance, and conformity assessment.
caveat: Standards and conformity-assessment rows are not national law unless a verified legal instrument incorporates them.
verificationNotes: Official page states that standards, once published in the OJEU, can provide legal presumption of conformity.

title: ISO/IEC 42001:2023 AI management system standard
summary: International AI management-system standard for establishing, implementing, maintaining, and improving AI governance processes.
caveat: Standards and conformity-assessment rows are not national law unless a verified legal instrument incorporates them.
verificationNotes: Official ISO page identifies ISO/IEC 42001:2023 as a published international AI management-system standard.

title: NIST AI RMF standards and risk-management context
summary: Voluntary AI risk-management framework used as technical governance context and referenced across public/private AI governance.
caveat: NIST AI RMF is voluntary guidance unless a separate legal or contractual instrument makes it operative.
verificationNotes: Official NIST source used for voluntary technical-governance context.

title: NIST AI RMF Generative AI Profile context
summary: Generative-AI profile for applying the NIST AI RMF to generative AI risks and controls.
caveat: Voluntary U.S. technical guidance; not an international agreement or binding law.
sourceName: NIST - AI RMF Generative AI Profile
verificationNotes: Official NIST publication page used for source-backed generative-AI governance context.

title: European Commission AI Act standardisation request
summary: Commission request and work programme for CEN-CENELEC AI Act-supporting harmonized standards across risk, data, transparency, oversight, robustness, cybersecurity, quality, and conformity assessment.
caveat: Standards and conformity-assessment rows are not national law unless a verified legal instrument incorporates them.
sourceName: European Commission - Standardisation of the AI Act
verificationNotes: Official Commission page states that the Commission requested CEN and CENELEC to develop standards in ten key AI Act areas.

title: prEN 18286 AI quality management system public enquiry
summary: First AI Act harmonized-standard candidate to enter public enquiry, focused on quality management systems for EU AI Act regulatory purposes.
caveat: Standards and conformity-assessment rows are not national law unless a verified legal instrument incorporates them.
sourceName: European Commission - Standardisation of the AI Act
verificationNotes: Official Commission page states that prEN 18286 entered public enquiry on 30 October 2025 and is designed to help high-risk AI providers comply with AI Act Article 17.

title: EU AI Act notified-body list infrastructure
summary: AI Act mechanism requiring the Commission to assign identification numbers and maintain a public list of notified bodies under the Regulation.
caveat: This row tracks the legal/institutional mechanism, not a populated final list of AI Act notified bodies.
verificationNotes: Official AI Act Service Desk text for Article 35 states that the Commission shall assign identification numbers and make the list of notified bodies publicly available and up to date.

title: NIST AI RMF Playbook
summary: Voluntary NIST AI RMF companion playbook with suggested actions for Govern, Map, Measure, and Manage functions.
caveat: Voluntary technical guidance; it becomes operative only through separate law, policy, contract, or organizational adoption.
verificationNotes: Official NIST page describes the Playbook as a voluntary companion to AI RMF 1.0 with suggested actions and references.

title: ISO/IEC 23894:2023 AI risk management guidance
summary: Published ISO/IEC guidance standard on managing risk related to AI products, systems, and services.
caveat: Issuer-controlled standards-body source; this is voluntary standards context unless incorporated by law or contract.
verificationNotes: Official ISO page identifies ISO/IEC 23894:2023 as a published international standard and describes AI risk-management guidance.

title: ISO/IEC 42005:2025 AI system impact assessment guidance
summary: Published ISO/IEC standard providing guidance for organizations conducting AI system impact assessments.
caveat: Issuer-controlled standards-body source; this is voluntary standards context unless incorporated by law or contract.
verificationNotes: Official ISO page identifies ISO/IEC 42005:2025 as a published international standard and describes AI system impact-assessment guidance.
